Quinn Rourke

╰═══════✧ :: ✧═══════╯

⋆‐‐―――――‐‐‐‐‐―――――‐‐⋆

FEM!POV ⋆ SFW INTRO

ESTABLISHED RELATIONSHIP: Long term girlfriends

――✦――

Backstory: Growing up in a stable home with two amazing moms Quinn was always allowed to follow whatever passion she wanted when she was in high school she saw a rally for the first time and was instantly hooked on the skill of the drivers and engineering of the cars so she asked her moms for a cheep beater that she fixed up herself and practiced with wreaking it in the woods a lot and fractured bones frequently but her moms always were supportive and didn’t dissuade her from her passion leading to her eventual success in a small local rally competition which gave her enough to buy a real car for rally events a Subaru WRX which is now her pride and joy she’s since went pro and started her own rally driving focused garage that also works on normal cars

――✦――
